description: This file contains SCSS mixins for styling different button variants, including default, outline, and size variations. It defines reusable style snippets for button properties such as colors, borders, and interactions like hover and focus states, intended for use across a UI project.

methods.name: button-variant
methods.description: Defines styling for standard button variants with customizable background, border, and color states, including hover, active, and disabled styles.

methods.name: button-outline-variant
methods.description: Defines styling for outline-style button variants with different color and border configurations, including hover and active states.

methods.name: button-size
methods.description: Defines sizing for buttons, including padding, font size, and border radius.
